title: Entity Blood Particles
description: This is a client-sided mod for Fabric that spawns blood particles on entities that take damage.
body:
**⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️**

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
<hr>

**Mod Description**

With this mod installed, every entity that takes damage (that doesn't have Absorption HP, _players with Absorption HP are supported as of v1.0.1_), will have blood particles come off of them. Another feature of this mod, is that the blood particles are tweaked: the amount of the particles depend on the damage dealt, and the blood particles spread, so that they match the damaged entity's hitbox, creating a realistic blood effect. For a visual of the mod, play the **Mod Demonstration Video** below, or view this mod's screenshots in the **Gallery Tab**.
<hr>

**Mod Demonstation Video**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/IZO4LtnacIo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<hr>

**Donation**

If you want, you can support me by donating with the link on this page.
